core-app.name: Core App
core-app.summary: The core multi-tenant GroLabs deployable — its specs, policies, design briefs, and current-state docs.

dev-studio.name: Dev Studio
dev-studio.summary: Standalone, project-agnostic studio that pairs a Designer (visualize a spec + AI panel → inject tasks to Notion) with an Executor (reads Notion → executes each task to a reviewable PR). Notion is the bridge. GroLabs is its first consumer.
